extortion.description: CIE Automotive is an industrial group specialised in supplying components and subassemblies for the automotive market. CIE Automotive focuses its activity on seven technologies — Aluminium, Forging, Stamping and Tube Welding, Machining, Plastic, Casting and Roof Systems. Website: www.cieautomotive.comRevenue : $3.6BAddress: 69 Alameda Mazarredo 8º, Bilbao, Basque Country, 48009, SpainPhone Number: +34 946054835
